query:
-- Check Middlemount Coal - S552C has no billing items but the customer has billing items
-- The Exetel 500Mbps service is billed as "500mb Business Grade Fibre" in Xero
-- Check if S552C has any billing items at all
SELECT bi.id, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.contactName
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName = 'Middlemount Coal Pty Ltd'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;

-- Check Legrand AV Australia billing items
SELECT bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Legrand%'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;

-- Check Body Corporate Osprey - SNVXEGL (Legion $799) has no billing items
-- but Osprey has billing items for S0236 and S0700 (500/500 Managed $1250 each)
-- SNVXEGL is a different service (Legion Fibre Business $799)
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
FROM services WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0038';

-- The Exetel 500Mbps service is billed as "500mb Business Grade Fibre" in Xero
-- Check if S552C has any billing items at all
SELECT bi.id, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.contactName
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName = 'Middlemount Coal Pty Ltd'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;

-- Check Legrand AV Australia billing items
SELECT bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Legrand%'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;

-- Check Body Corporate Osprey - SNVXEGL (Legion $799) has no billing items
-- but Osprey has billing items for S0236 and S0700 (500/500 Managed $1250 each)
-- SNVXEGL is a different service (Legion Fibre Business $799)
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
FROM services WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0038';
